name: DistilBART CNN 12-6
description: Distilled BART model fine-tuned on CNN/DailyMail, good for extractive-style summarization on CPU

name: T5 Small
description: Lightweight T5 model at ~240MB, requires instruction prefix. Good CPU performance for summarization tasks.

name: OpenRouter Free Model
description: Free LLM model via OpenRouter API. Uses the best available free model. Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable.
